form.formComment: Comes here off a 55-day let-up. Last start sat on the speed throughout before fading 11th of 14 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 1600m, 5 len behind Flying Boom carrying 52kg at $23. The race before that 9th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1800m, 2.5 len behind Storm Runner with 54kg at $12. Has ability and looks one of the major players coming back in grade.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four months. Finished off last preparation when last of 14 at Sha Tin December 20 over 1400m, 23 len behind Manythanks Forever carrying 59.5kg at $25. When resuming last campaign fifth of 12 at this track October 15 over 1200m, 4 len behind Mr Desira carrying 54kg at $9.80. Likely to make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. Last start 5th of 14 at Sha Tin All Weather on March 15 over 1650m, 5 len behind Go Go Go with 58.5kg at $15. The start before that 7th of 14 at Sha Tin on February 22 over 1800m, 3 len behind Cool Blue carrying 56kg at $13. Working up to a win. Gets Moreira in the saddle today and he can return to his best form.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 4th of 12 at Sha Tin All Weather on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Viva Chaleur carrying 53kg at $8.90. Previously second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 12 at Sha Tin All Weather on October 30 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Notthesillyone with 54.5kg at $3.80. Creates plenty of interest stepping up in trip today.

form.formComment: Most recently ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, neck behind Glorious Ryder with 54.5kg at $3.50. The race before that 6th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1800m, 2.75 len behind Super Sicario with 54.5kg at $10. Working up to a win. In good order and can notch up his maiden victory in what looks a suitable assignment.
